name: League Acedemy
description:
League of legends characters, all in one

updatelog

this was normally discontinued but i decided to add some of characters yall asked for.

more characters are gonna come, you can suggest at the comment section

it can contain bugs, for example mixing up the characters, these usually dont accur because of me but please tell me the bugs at the comments

the characters that are not in the list isnt added yet and it would mostly contain bugs if you try to use them in chat

anyways have fun

**!!all characters are aged up to 18!!**
